Meridian Therapeutics, Inc. - Protocol HORIZON (MRD-204-017)
Principal Investigator: Elena Park

Site: Atlas Research Partners (ARP-12), Houston, TX -

Effective date 2021-12-03

Overhead 25% on subject visits

Subject visits billed at procedure level plus 25% overhead.
Sponsor withholds 10% of each visit-cost payment per Article A-2 (released at study close).
A visit invoice settled at 90% of face is paid in full per terms.
Site-cost invoices carry no overhead and no holdback.

Screen failures: reimbursed for actual procedures performed up to the screening total.
Pre-screen chart review capped at $3,000 (Amendment 1).

Net 30 from invoice receipt.

Amendment 1 (2022-11-23): Chart-review reimbursement added, capped at $3,000.
